input.headline: We did it!': Countries celebrate World Cup qualification

raw.headline: We did it!': Countries celebrate World Cup qualification

winner: Oh joy! Now that we've qualified for the World Cup, we can finally start losing games with pride!

candidates.text: Well, it's certainly a world-shattering event... we qualified for a cup that can hold water.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'world-shattering' and 'cup that can hold water,' but it lacks specificity and feels a bit forced in context."}

candidates.text: The cat declared triumphantly, "We did it!": Bowls celebrated International Washing qualification.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the pun on 'International Washing qualification,' but it lacks clarity and the connection to the original headline is weak."}

candidates.text: Why don't football teams ever get lost? Because they always know their goal-ations.
